subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-19 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: It would now be fitting to prepare the means of travel to other planets!
subcodes.first_line_orig: حال خوب است اسباب مسافرت بکُرات دیگر فراهم کنند
subcodes.subjects: @plenitude; the pervasiveness of life in the cosmos, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology
